name: Zucchini & Onion Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup skim milk, heated to boiling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt margarine and cook zucchini with onion, stirring occasionally until very tender; set aside.
2. In a blender, sprinkle gelatin over cold water; let stand 2 minutes.
3. Add hot milk and process at low speed for 2 minutes.
4. Add sour cream, cheese, dill, salt, and pepper, then zucchini mixture. Process at high speed until smooth.
5. Pour into a bowl. Chill until set.
6. To serve, whisk smooth.
